title: EngagementConfig
description: FHIR server connection config for a DQAR engagement. Place populated files in config/engagements/ (gitignored).

server_type.description: FHIR server implementation. Determines auth strategy and any API path differences.

base_url.description: Root URL of the FHIR server, no trailing slash. FHIR endpoints are resolved relative to this.

basic_user.description: HTTP Basic auth username (HAPI only, optional)

basic_password.description: HTTP Basic auth password (HAPI only, optional)

s3_bucket.description: S3 bucket name for anonymized extract uploads (Path B)

s3_prefix.description: S3 key prefix for this engagement, e.g. engagements/eng-clienta-jun26

s3_region.description: AWS region for the S3 bucket

s3_upload_expiry.description: Presigned PUT URL expiry in seconds (default 172800 = 48h)

organization_id.description: Aidbox Organization resource ID for this engagement (multitenancy scope)

display_name.description: Client-facing name shown in the upload portal, e.g. Acme Health Plan
